summary: Full e2e testing of TriageAI MVP. Backend: 12/12 pytest tests passed including real Claude Sonnet 4.5 triage (took ~22s, returned valid structured JSON). Frontend: All 4 pages load, seed/select-all/run-triage/incident-detail/analytics/settings all functional end-to-end. Triage UI showed P1 priority, 3 root cause hypotheses, multi-phase remediation playbook, noise alert filter (2 flagged), affected services chips. Incident appears in Incidents register; Analytics dashboard renders bar/line charts and KPI cards.

issues: Recharts emits 'width(-1) and height(-1)' console warnings on initial mount before container measures; charts still render. Cosmetic only - consider setting min-height on ResponsiveContainer parent.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 415 lines - acceptable but approaching the threshold; consider splitting routes/models/triage into modules as scope grows.
run_triage falls back to a mock structure on LLM failure (good UX) but should also log incident/triage with a 'fallback=true' flag for observability.
Analytics ResponsiveContainer triggers initial width(-1) warnings - add explicit min-h to parent div.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed inserts 10 deterministic sample alerts; used during tests and re-run idempotently.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints incl. real Claude triage call (~25s). Run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Frontend testids available: seed-btn, simulate-btn, run-triage-btn, alert-select-all, triage-result-panel, incident-detail, kpi-grid, resolve-incident-btn, plus incident-row-{id} and alert-card-{id}.
